overall.description: Gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing third-person perspective of a convertible driving at high speed through a desert highway. The vehicle overtakes another car, passes a roadside gas station and parked vehicles, then curves toward a distant futuristic city skyline.

approaching a vehicle ahead in the distance on the same lane

scattered desert trees lining both sides of the road
distant mountain range forming the horizon backdrop

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a high-speed driving sequence on a desert highway. A black sports car overtakes on the right and pulls ahead. The landscape features sparse Joshua trees and distant mountains under a clear blue sky. The camera follows the convertible smoothly as it maintains speed down the straight road.

scene_state.functional_zone: desert highway approaching roadside gas station

events.description: approaching and passing a roadside gas station with neon signage on the right

agents.ego_description: maintaining high speed while passing a gas station structure on the right side of the highway

roadside directional sign on the right shoulder

segments.scene_description: The vehicle continues straight through the desert, approaching a roadside gas station that appears on the right. The station features a canopy and neon signage typical of the game's aesthetic. After passing the station, the landscape returns to open desert with Joshua trees passing by closer to the camera.

agents.ego_description: driving past a roadside rest area with parked cars and people standing nearby

segments.scene_description: The highway continues through increasingly rocky desert terrain with red rock formations visible on the right. The vehicle passes a small roadside area with parked cars and standing pedestrians on the left. The landscape remains arid with sparse vegetation and the mountain range still visible ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: curving desert highway with distant city skyline

events.description: highway curves right revealing the Night City skyline on the left horizon
vehicle navigates a gentle right curve while maintaining high speed

agents.ego_description: navigating a right curve on the highway with the futuristic city skyline now visible ahead on the left

entered.detail: futuristic skyscrapers and towers of Night City visible on the distant horizon
power lines and wooden utility poles along the right roadside

segments.scene_description: The highway begins a gentle curve to the right, revealing the iconic Night City skyline with its futuristic towers on the left horizon. The landscape transitions to more prominent red rock formations on the right, now closer to the road. Power lines run parallel to the highway as the vehicle maintains speed through the curve toward the distant metropolis.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a high-speed drive across a vast desert highway that gradually reveals a futuristic urban skyline on the horizon. It begins with a black sports car overtaking another vehicle on a straight road flanked by sparse Joshua trees and distant mountains under a clear blue sky. As the car maintains its speed, the scene shifts past a neon-lit roadside gas station before moving into increasingly rocky terrain characterized by red rock formations and small clusters of parked cars and pedestrians. The highway then begins a gentle curve to the right, causing the landscape to open up and reveal the towering skyscrapers of Night City on the left. Finally, the camera tracks the vehicle as it passes parallel power lines and closer red cliffs, heading steadily toward the distant metropolis.
